model.label: Location Schedule
model.description: Weekly schedule with locations and times

values.title: Welcome to Fuego Street Kitchen
values.hero_title: Street Tacos. Real Flavor. No Boundaries.
values.hero_subtitle: Fire-Grilled Tacos & More From Our Truck to You
values.hero_description: Fuego Street Kitchen brings bold, authentic street food to your neighborhood. Every taco, burrito, and bowl is made from scratch using family recipes, locally sourced ingredients, and fire-grilled meats. Find us on the streets or book us for your next event.
values.cta_description: We roll to a different spot every day of the week. Check our schedule to find us near you, or follow us on social media for real-time location updates and daily specials.

values.title: Slow-Roasted Carnitas Taco
values.body:
Our signature taco. Pork shoulder braised low and slow for 8 hours in citrus and spices, then crisped on the flat-top. Served on a double corn tortilla with house-made salsa verde, pickled red onion, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.

This is the taco that started it all — the recipe handed down from our founder's abuela in Michoacan.

image.alt: Carnitas taco with salsa verde and pickled onion

values.title: Al Pastor Taco
values.body: Thinly sliced pork marinated in a blend of dried chiles, achiote, and pineapple, cooked on our vertical spit and shaved to order. Topped with grilled pineapple, diced white onion, cilantro, and our smoky chipotle crema.

image.alt: Al pastor taco with grilled pineapple

values.title: Baja Fish Taco
values.body: Beer-battered Pacific cod fried until golden and crispy, nestled in a flour tortilla with shredded cabbage, pickled jalapeno, house tartar sauce, and a drizzle of lime crema. Light, crunchy, and bursting with flavor.

image.alt: Crispy Baja fish taco with lime crema

values.title: Loaded Street Burrito
values.body: A massive flour tortilla stuffed with your choice of protein (carnitas, al pastor, grilled chicken, or sofritas), cilantro-lime rice, black beans, pico de gallo, guacamole, sour cream, and queso fresco. Grilled on the flat-top for a crispy, golden exterior.

image.alt: Loaded burrito cut in half showing fillings

values.title: Fuego Bowl
values.body: Everything you love about our burritos, deconstructed in a bowl. Cilantro-lime rice, black beans, your choice of protein, house-made guacamole, pico de gallo, pickled jalapenos, queso fresco, and a drizzle of our signature Fuego sauce. Perfect for those who want all the flavor without the tortilla.

image.alt: Colorful burrito bowl with fresh toppings

values.title: Street Elote
values.body: Fire-roasted corn on the cob slathered with mayo, cotija cheese, chili powder, and a squeeze of lime. A classic Mexican street food staple done right. Available on the cob or cut off as esquites in a cup.

image.alt: Mexican street corn with cotija cheese and chili

values.title: Monday: Tech Park
values.body: Start your week right with Fuego! We set up in the main courtyard of the Tech Park office complex, serving lunch to the busy professionals of the innovation district. Look for us near the central fountain. Free parking in the visitor lot.

image.alt: Food truck parked in an office park courtyard

values.title: Wednesday: Brewery Row
values.body: Hump day calls for tacos and craft beer! We park right outside Iron Rail Brewing Co. every Wednesday evening. Grab your favorite brew inside, then come out and order from our full menu. Live music on the patio most weeks.

image.alt: Food truck parked near a brewery at evening

values.title: Saturday: Downtown Farmers Market
values.body: Our busiest day of the week! We set up at the downtown farmers market every Saturday morning. Grab fresh produce from the vendors, then swing by Fuego for breakfast tacos and our famous horchata. We're located at the west entrance near the fountain.

image.alt: Busy farmers market with food truck in background

values.title: About Fuego Street Kitchen
values.body:
Fuego Street Kitchen was born in 2019 when chef and founder Carlos Medina decided to bring his family's recipes to the streets. Growing up in his abuela's kitchen in Michoacan, Mexico, Carlos learned that the best food comes from simple ingredients, real technique, and a lot of heart.

Our Food

Everything on our truck is made from scratch daily. We grind our own spice blends, press our own tortillas, and slow-cook our meats overnight. We source produce from local farms whenever possible and never use frozen, pre-made, or artificial ingredients.

The Truck

Our custom-built food truck — nicknamed "La Bestia" — is equipped with a full commercial kitchen including a vertical spit for al pastor, a flat-top griddle, a deep fryer, and a wood-fired section for our signature char-grilled flavor.

Book Us

Fuego is available for private events, corporate lunches, weddings, festivals, and parties. We can serve groups of 30 to 300+. Contact us for custom menus and pricing.

values.title: Event Catering & Private Bookings
values.body:
Bring Fuego to Your Event

Want a taco truck at your wedding? A burrito bar at your corporate event? Fuego Street Kitchen is available for private bookings and catering throughout the region.

Catering Packages

  • Taco Bar (min. 30 guests) — $15/person: 3 proteins, tortillas, all toppings, sides, and agua fresca
  • Full Menu Experience (min. 50 guests) — $22/person: Full truck menu plus elote, chips & guac, and horchata
  • Premium Fiesta (min. 75 guests) — $30/person: Everything above plus appetizers, custom menu items, and dessert

How It Works

  1. Tell us your date, guest count, and event details
  2. We'll send a custom proposal within 24 hours
  3. Confirm with a 50% deposit
  4. We show up, set up, serve, and clean up

Contact

Email: events@fuegostreet.com
Phone: (555) 432-1098
Instagram: @fuegostreet
